commit.subject: LU-15069 llite: clarify eof and align logic
commit.message:
LU-15069 llite: clarify eof and align logic

This slightly clarifies the eof and alignment logic for
readahead.

Test-Parameters: trivial
Signed-off-by: Patrick Farrell <pfarrell@whamcloud.com>
Change-Id: I210d19d2e3d2165057e56583ad8642966e658f86
